/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/wg_radius_domain_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/wg_radius_domain_tests.dir/tests/test_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wg_radius_domain_tests.dir/tests/peer_session_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wg_radius_domain_tests.dir/tests/session_manager_tests.cpp.o -o wg_radius_domain_tests  libwg_radius_domain.a
